scripts.test:agent-api-control: sh -c 'sh ./bin/run-php.sh tests/agent-api-control-contract-test.php && sh ./bin/run-php.sh tests/agent-api-endpoint-parity-contract-test.php && sh ./bin/run-php.sh tests/agent-api-quickstart-contract-test.php && sh ./bin/run-php.sh tests/agent-mcp-wrapper-contract-test.php && sh ./bin/run-php.sh tests/agent-prod-smoke-contract-test.php && node examples/agent-api/mcp-smoke.js'
scripts.test:agent-mcp: sh -c 'node --check examples/agent-api/mcp-server.js && sh ./bin/run-php.sh tests/agent-mcp-wrapper-contract-test.php && node examples/agent-api/mcp-smoke.js'
scripts.test:report-modules: sh -c 'sh ./bin/run-php.sh tests/report-filter-contract-test.php && sh ./bin/run-php.sh tests/report-adjustment-contract-test.php && sh ./bin/run-php.sh tests/report-export-contract-test.php && sh ./bin/run-php.sh tests/reporting-flow-contract-test.php && sh ./bin/run-php.sh tests/report-time-overview-contract-test.php && sh ./bin/run-php.sh tests/report-rate-parity-contract-test.php && sh ./bin/run-php.sh tests/report-billing-review-js-contract-test.php'
scripts.test:settings-modules: sh -c 'sh ./bin/run-php.sh tests/settings-action-contract-test.php && sh ./bin/run-php.sh tests/settings-email-contract-test.php && sh ./bin/run-php.sh tests/settings-update-contract-test.php && sh ./bin/run-php.sh tests/settings-render-contract-test.php'
scripts.test:email-policy: sh -c 'sh ./bin/run-php.sh tests/notification-policy-test.php && sh ./bin/run-php.sh tests/email-notification-contract-test.php && sh ./bin/run-php.sh tests/email-format-test.php && sh ./bin/run-php.sh tests/pseudo-cron-email-test.php'
